plugins.name: call-notes
plugins.description: Turns a raw call or meeting transcript into structured, actionable notes — summary, key points, decisions, action items, follow-ups, and notable details. Supports optional scoring templates.

plugins.name: code-handoff
plugins.description: Packages the current conversation into a handoff document for a fresh coding agent session.

plugins.name: copy-editor
plugins.description: Takes an editorial pass on existing prose to improve clarity and flow while preserving the author's voice.

plugins.name: planning-photoshoots
plugins.description: A conversational photography companion that recommends gear loadouts, styles, and practical tips for a shoot based on goals, location, weather, and owned equipment.

plugins.name: rubber-duck
plugins.description: Switches Claude into a brainstorming / thinking-out-loud mode where the user's messages are exploratory musings rather than orders or facts, so Claude pushes back, stress-tests ideas, and follows premises to their extremes instead of implementing them. Use when the user invokes /rubber-duck or signals they're just thinking out loud.
